notes.body: CO2: Check your CO2 levels. If below 25%, call and place an order now — supplier may be short on supply. All locations should have a 50 lb backup tank; if you don't have one, call to order. Standing (7/9): schedule is still written over 25% — hold labor under 25% this week.

Weekly sales +17.3% W/W ($31,729 vs $27,050 LY). COGS Flash (wk ending 7/12): CGS $8,517, CP% 26.8, FP% 25.2. Open CT tasks: Labor Review 7/11 + 7/12, Inventory Final for Post 7/12, Post Period — Labor Not Posted 7/12. Close today.

Manager Certifications 2065: all three MITs passed — Rusul 100, Anthony 99, Madelynn 98. Temporary certificates issued; training videos fixed. Standing KPI: 60% of score = Secret Shops + Customer complaints + Ticket times.
Sunday 7/12: Closing Checklist MISSED — owner Madison Cureton (PM). AM Vicki Lucey, PM Madison Cureton. Close the loop tonight.
⚠️ Overdue rate elevated (~54%). Push crew below 100% before it compounds. 12 active crew with no FGU account or stuck at 0% (Angela, Ash, Chloe, Divan, Grace, Javeh +6 more).
